calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, II. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Anwar Shaikh.
Plaintiff's Witness Abdus Kapadia was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Andrew Austin and Rhonda Parks.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 917 Folsom St., #408, San Francisco, CA 94107.
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover Damages - $4,225.68
No attorney's fees.
Waived Costs.
Total - $4,225.68

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Anwar Shaikh is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrew Austin is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of NOV-21-2011 remains on calendar.
